scripts.start: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const {spawn}=require('child_process'); const candidates=['next/standalone/server.js','next/standalone/workspace/server.js']; const target=candidates.find(p=>fs.existsSync(p)); if(!target){console.error('Standalone server.js not found. Tried: '+candidates.join(', ')); process.exit(1);} spawn(process.execPath,[target],{stdio:'inherit'}).on('exit',c=>process.exit(c ?? 1));"
